and I love those, it becomes a family. They rely on each other more than they will rely

room and they all share. So many times you know you're dealing with something,
person next to you already went through it and figured it out. Why would you learn
through your own trial and error? You learn from the person next to you, right?
So what this tool, the needle movers is, is we encourage, not encourage, it's almost
mandatory without them knowing, that the group becomes filled with the desire to
share their biggest breakthroughs. That reciprocity is built at the highest level possible.
So what we get, especially when people come back. Quarter after quarter or say three
